fails.q: What is the maximum capacity and the average of all stadiums ?
fails.gold: select max(capacity), average from stadium
fails.pred: SELECT MAX(Capacity), AVG(Average) FROM stadium

fails.q: For each stadium, how many concerts play there?
fails.gold: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM concert AS T1 JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.stadium_id  =  T2.stadium_id GROUP BY T1.stadium_id
fails.pred: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(c.concert_ID) FROM stadium s LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name

fails.q: List singer names and number of concerts for each singer.
fails.gold: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.singer_id  =  T2.singer_id GROUP BY T2.singer_id
fails.pred: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(sic.concert_ID) FROM singer s LEFT JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON s.Singer_ID = sic.Singer_ID GROUP BY s.Singer_ID, s.Name

fails.q: What are the names of the singers and number of concerts for each person?
fails.gold: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.singer_id  =  T2.singer_id GROUP BY T2.singer_id
fails.pred: SELECT T1.Name, COUNT(T2.concert_ID) FROM singer AS T1 LEFT JOIN singer_in_concert AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Singer_ID

fails.q: List all singer names in concerts in year 2014.
fails.gold: SELECT T2.name FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.singer_id  =  T2.singer_id JOIN concert AS T3 ON T1.concert_id  =  T3.concert_id WHERE T3.year  =  2014
fails.pred: SELECT DISTINCT s.Name FROM singer s JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON s.Singer_ID = sic.Singer_ID JOIN concert c ON sic.concert_ID = c.concert_ID WHERE c.Year = '2014'

fails.q: What are the names of the singers who performed in a concert in 2014?
fails.gold: SELECT T2.name FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.singer_id  =  T2.singer_id JOIN concert AS T3 ON T1.concert_id  =  T3.concert_id WHERE T3.year  =  2014
fails.pred: SELECT DISTINCT s.Name FROM singer s JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON s.Singer_ID = sic.Singer_ID JOIN concert c ON sic.concert_ID = c.concert_ID WHERE c.Year = '2014'

fails.q: What is the first name of every student who has a dog but does not have a cat?
fails.gold: SELECT T1.fname ,  T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid  =  T2.petid WHERE T3.pettype  =  'dog' AND T1.stuid NOT IN (SELECT T1.stuid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid  =  T2.petid WHERE T3.pettype  =  'cat')
fails.pred: SELECT DISTINCT S.Fname FROM Student S JOIN Has_Pet HP ON S.StuID = HP.StuID JOIN Pets P ON HP.PetID = P.PetID WHERE P.PetType = 'dog' AND S.StuID NOT IN (SELECT HP2.StuID FROM Has_Pet HP2 JOIN Pets P2 ON HP2.PetID = P2.PetID WHERE P2.PetType = 'cat')

fails.q: Find the average and maximum age for each type of pet.

fails.pred: SELECT PetType, AVG(pet_age), MAX(pet_age) FROM Pets GROUP BY PetType

fails.q: For students who have pets , how many pets does each student have ? list their ids instead of names .
fails.gold: select count(*) ,  t1.stuid from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid group by t1.stuid
fails.pred: SELECT T1.StuID, COUNT(*) FROM Has_Pet AS T1 JOIN Pets AS T2 ON T1.PetID = T2.PetID GROUP BY T1.StuID

fails.q: What is the model of the car with the smallest amount of horsepower?
fails.gold: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.horsepower ASC LIMIT 1;
fails.pred: SELECT T1.Model FROM car_names AS T1 JOIN cars_data AS T2 ON T1.MakeId = T2.Id ORDER BY T2.Horsepower + 0 ASC LIMIT 1

fails.q: Find the name of the makers that produced some cars in the year of 1970?
fails.gold: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T3 ON T2.model  =  T3.model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T4 ON T3.MakeId  =  T4.id WHERE T4.year  =  '1970';
fails.pred: SELECT DISTINCT cm.FullName FROM car_makers cm JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker JOIN car_names cn ON ml.Model = cn.Model JOIN cars_data cd ON cn.MakeId = cd.Id WHERE cd.Year = 1970

fails.q: What is the maker of the carr produced in the earliest year and what year was it?
fails.gold: SELECT T2.Make ,  T1.Year FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T1.Year  =  (SELECT min(YEAR) FROM CARS_DATA);
fails.pred: SELECT cm.Maker, cd.Year FROM cars_data cd JOIN car_names cn ON cd.Id = cn.MakeId JOIN model_list ml ON cn.Model = ml.Model JOIN car_makers cm ON ml.Maker = cm.Id WHERE cd.Year = (SELECT MIN(Year) FROM cars_data)

fails.q: What is the number of car models that are produced by each maker and what is the id and full name of each maker?
fails.gold: SELECT Count(*) ,  T2.FullName ,  T2.id FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id GROUP BY T2.id;
fails.pred: SELECT COUNT(*), T2.Id, T2.FullName FROM model_list AS T1 JOIN car_makers AS T2 ON T1.Maker = T2.Id GROUP BY T2.Id

fails.q: What is the number of makers of care in France?
fails.gold: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId WHERE T2.CountryName  =  'france';
fails.pred: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM car_makers cm JOIN countries c ON cm.Country = c.CountryId WHERE c.CountryName = 'France'

fails.q: What are the makers and models?
fails.gold: SELECT Maker ,  Model FROM MODEL_LIST;
fails.pred: SELECT Maker, Model FROM car_names

fails.q: What are the names of all European countries with at least 3 manufacturers?
fails.gold: SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent  =  T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId  =  T3.Country WHERE T2.Continent  =  'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName HAVING count(*)  >=  3;
fails.pred: SELECT c.CountryName FROM countries c JOIN continents co ON c.Continent = co.ContId JOIN car_makers m ON m.Country = c.CountryId WHERE co.Continent = 'Europe' GROUP BY c.CountryId, c.CountryName HAVING COUNT(m.Id) >= 3

fails.q: What is the maximum horsepower and the make of the car models with 3 cylinders?
fails.gold: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.cylinders  =  3 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
fails.pred: SELECT cd.Horsepower, cn.Make FROM cars_data cd JOIN car_names cn ON cd.Id = cn.MakeId WHERE cd.Cylinders = 3 ORDER BY cd.Horsepower + 0 DESC LIMIT 1

fails.q: What is the largest amount of horsepower for the models with 3 cylinders and what make is it?
fails.gold: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.cylinders  =  3 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
fails.pred: SELECT cn.Make, cd.Horsepower FROM cars_data cd JOIN car_names cn ON cd.Id = cn.MakeId WHERE cd.Cylinders = 3 ORDER BY cd.Horsepower * 1 DESC LIMIT 1

fails.q: What is the car model with the highest mpg ?
fails.gold: select t1.model from car_names as t1 join cars_data as t2 on t1.makeid  =  t2.id order by t2.mpg desc limit 1;
fails.pred: SELECT T1.Model FROM car_names AS T1 JOIN cars_data AS T2 ON T1.MakeId = T2.Id ORDER BY T2.MPG + 0 DESC LIMIT 1

fails.q: How many cars have a larger accelerate than the car with the largest horsepower?

fails.pred: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cars_data WHERE Accelerate > (SELECT Accelerate FROM cars_data ORDER BY Horsepower+0 DESC LIMIT 1)

fails.q: What is the number of cars with a greater accelerate than the one with the most horsepower?

fails.q: How many countries has more than 2 car makers ?
fails.gold: select count(*) from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country group by t1.countryid having count(*)  >  2
fails.pred: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT Country FROM car_makers GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*) > 2)

fails.gold: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
fails.pred: SELECT cn.Model FROM cars_data cd JOIN car_names cn ON cd.Id = cn.MakeId WHERE cd.Cylinders = 4 ORDER BY cd.Horsepower + 0 DESC LIMIT 1

fails.q: Which models are lighter than 3500 but not built by the 'Ford Motor Company'?
fails.gold: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.Id JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T4 ON T1.Maker  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.weight  <  3500 AND T4.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company';
fails.pred: SELECT DISTINCT cn.Model FROM car_names cn JOIN cars_data cd ON cn.MakeId = cd.Id WHERE cd.Weight < 3500 AND cn.Model NOT IN (SELECT ml.Model FROM model_list ml JOIN car_makers cm ON ml.Maker = cm.Id WHERE cm.FullName = 'Ford Motor Company')

fails.q: What are the different models wthat are lighter than 3500 but were not built by the Ford Motor Company?
fails.gold: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.Id JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T4 ON T1.Maker  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.weight  <  3500 AND T4.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company';
fails.pred: SELECT DISTINCT cn.Model FROM car_names cn JOIN cars_data cd ON cn.MakeId = cd.Id WHERE cd.Weight < 3500 AND cn.Model NOT IN (SELECT ml.Model FROM model_list ml JOIN car_makers cm ON ml.Maker = cm.Id WHERE cm.FullName = 'Ford Motor Company')

fails.q: Which are the car makers which produce at least 2 models and more than 3 car makers ? List the id and the maker .
fails.gold: select t1.id ,  t1.maker from car_makers as t1 join model_list as t2 on t1.id  =  t2.maker group by t1.id having count(*)  >=  2 intersect select t1.id ,  t1.maker from car_makers as t1 join model_list as t2 on t1.id  =  t2.maker join car_names as t3 on t2.model  =  t3.model group by t1.id having count(*)  >  3;
fails.pred: SELECT T1.Id, T1.Maker FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.Maker JOIN car_names AS T3 ON T2.Model = T3.Model GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Model) >= 2 AND COUNT(T3.MakeId) > 3

fails.q: What are the ids and makers of all car makers that produce at least 2 models and make more than 3 cars?
fails.gold: SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T3 ON T2.model  =  T3.model GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  3;
fails.pred: SELECT cm.Id, cm.Maker FROM car_makers cm JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker JOIN car_names cn ON ml.Model = cn.Model GROUP BY cm.Id, cm.Maker HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ml.Model) >= 2 AND COUNT(cn.MakeId) > 3

fails.q: Which airline has most number of flights?
fails.gold: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

fails.q: What airline serves the most flights?
fails.gold: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
fails.pred: SELECT al.Airline FROM flights f JOIN airlines al ON f.Airline = al.uid GROUP BY f.Airline ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

fails.q: Find the abbreviation and country of the airline that has fewest number of flights?

fails.pred: SELECT T1.Abbreviation, T1.Country FROM airlines T1 JOIN flights T2 ON T1.uid = T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.uid ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

fails.q: What is the abbreviation of the airilne has the fewest flights and what country is it in?
fails.gold: SELECT T1.Abbreviation ,  T1.Country FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1
fails.pred: SELECT a.Abbreviation, a.Country FROM airlines a JOIN flights f ON a.uid = f.Airline GROUP BY a.uid ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1
